vibe: Premium, Cinematic, Editorial, Mexican Pride, Industrial

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
scale.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight

rules.headings: Use Cormorant Garamond for all H1/H2 to create an editorial feel. No bold weights for large headers, use light or regular.
rules.body: Use Manrope for clean, utilitarian readability.
rules.accents: Use JetBrains Mono for tracking numbers, quotes, metric data, and overlines.

layout_patterns.hero: Full-bleed background (video/image) with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60). Text left-aligned or centered, with primary red accent elements. Use 'Transportando Emociones' with pride.
layout_patterns.bento_grid: Asymmetric grids for services (e.g. 1 hero tile spanning 2 rows, 2 standard tiles). Grid items should have deep dark backgrounds (#171717) and 1px borders (#27272A).
layout_patterns.alternating_sections: Alternate between pitch black (#0A0A0A) and dark zinc (#171717) to create rhythm.
layout_patterns.forms: Minimalist 'Control Room' style forms for quoting and tracking. Use JetBrains Mono for inputs, bright red for the submit CTA.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl). Sticky top. Red CTA button for 'Cotizar'.
components.hero: Cinematic. Overline: 'ORGULLOSAMENTE MEXICANOS'. H1: 'Transportando Emociones, Entregando Confianza.' Dual CTAs: Red solid for Quote, transparent outlined for Track.
components.quote_form: Floating control panel over the hero or just below it. 1px zinc border. Inputs: Origen, Destino, Peso. Strict grid layout.
components.service_tiles: Image mosaic bento grid. Hover effect: image scales slightly, red accent line appears at the bottom.
components.stats_block: Large numbers in Cormorant Garamond (e.g., '30+', '29', '16+'). Mono font for labels (Años de experiencia, Ciudades, Estados).
components.footer: Massive footer. Very dark background. Large PMM logo. Grid columns for links. 'Let's Talk' CTA.

pages.home: Hero (Video/Image) -> Quick Quote & Tracking Panel -> Stats & Proof Points -> Services Mosaic (B2B/Personas) -> Coverage Map Hook -> SEO Blog Posts -> Footer.
pages.cobertura: Dark map visualization. Zip code search bar. List of 29 cities and 16+ states.
pages.cotizador: Dedicated large form. Clean, highly functional, no distractions.
pages.rastreo: Central input field, large typography. Timeline view for package status.
pages.servicios: Detailed breakdown with rich imagery. Tabs for B2B vs Personas.
pages.blog: Editorial grid layout. High contrast text.
pages.sucursales: List view with LocalBusiness Schema mapping.
pages.contacto: Split layout. Form on the left, contact info and map on the right.

interactions.hover: Subtle translate-y-1 on cards. Buttons scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95).

seo.schema: Implement LocalBusiness for Sucursales and Organization for the main site.
